Telekinesis.name: Telekinesis
Telekinesis.description: Push a unit within your line of sight away from you 10 tiles.

Telekinesis2.description: Push a unit within your line of sight away from you 10 tiles with Chain Knockback.

Suggestion.name: Suggestion
Suggestion.description: Cause an enemy within your line of sight to attack another enemy if it can.

Suggestion2.description: Cause enemies in a target area within your line of sight to each attack another enemy if they can.

MindControl.name: Mind Control
MindControl.description: Charm an enemy within your line of sight for the rest of the battle.

MindControl2.description: Charm an enemy within your line of sight for the rest of the battle. That unit immediately takes an extra turn.

MegaGrav.name: Mega Grav
MegaGrav.description: Damage and throw each unit near you to random tiles.

MegaGrav2.description: Damage and throw each unit in a target area to random tiles.

PsyFlutter2.description:
Teleport exactly three tiles away.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

MagnetPull.name: Gravity Pull
MagnetPull.description: Pull units toward a tile within range 5.

MagnetPull2.description: Pull units in a larger area toward a tile at infinite range.

MindBlast.name: Mindblast
MindBlast.description: Push away each unit near you. This inflicts Madness and has a small chance to inflict Stun.

MindBlast2.description: Push away each unit near a target area. This inflicts Madness and has a small chance to inflict Stun.

PsychicChoke.name: Psychic Choke
PsychicChoke.description: Deal damage to and inflict Bruise on a unit within your line of sight.

PsychicChoke2.description: Deal damage to and inflict Bruise on a unit within your line of sight. This damage counts as physical damage and scales with [img:str].

SkyShatter.name: Shatter the Sky
SkyShatter.description: Create floating glass shards on a tile within your line of sight.

SkyShatter2.description: Create floating glass shards in an area within your line of sight.

Supernova.name: Supernova
Supernova.description: Deal damage to and inflict Blind on every unit within your line of sight.

Supernova2.description: Deal damage to and inflict Blind on every unit within your line of sight, excluding your allies.

ReadMind.name: Read Mind
ReadMind.description: Replace your spells with the spells of an ally cat until the end of the turn.

ReadMind2.description: Replace your spells with upgraded versions of the spells of an ally cat until the end of the turn.

AlterDNA.name: Alter DNA
AlterDNA.description: Spend all your mana. Give a unit within your line of sight a random stat up for every 3 mana spent (rounded up). Give enemies random stat downs instead.

AlterDNA2.description: Spend all your mana. Give a unit within your line of sight a random stat up for every 2 mana spent (rounded up). Give enemies random stat downs instead.

Flicker.name: Flicker
Flicker.description: Teleport two tiles away. Displace any units you teleport into.

Flicker2.description: Teleport two tiles away. Displace any units you teleport into and inflict them with Confusion 2 and Blind 2.

MindMeld.name: Mind Meld
MindMeld.description:
Give another unit an extra turn after this one.
This spell can't be cast during extra turns.

MindMeld2.description:
Give another unit +10 mana and an extra turn after this one.
This spell can't be cast during extra turns.

Vaccuum.name: Vacuum
Vaccuum.description: Teleport all enemies within an area as close to the center of that area as possible.

Vaccuum2.description: Teleport all enemies within a large area as close to the center of that area as possible and inflict Confusion on those units.

Ping.name: Ping
Ping.description:
Deal 1 damage to any unit within your line of sight.
RELOAD: Spend mana

Ping2.description:
Deal 1 damage to any unit within your line of sight.
RELOAD: Spend mana
Bonus Passive: +2 [img:int].

FlashForward.name: Flash Forward
FlashForward.description: Teleport to any tile. At the end of your turn, teleport back to your original tile and deal 10 damage to any unit you teleport into.

FlashForward2.description:
Teleport to any tile. At the end of your turn, teleport back to your original tile and deal 10 damage to any unit you teleport into.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Order.name: Order
Order.description: Force a unit within your line of sight to move and attack one of its enemies.

Order2.description: Give a unit within your line of sight All Stats Up and force it to move and attack one of its enemies.

TemporalShards.name: Temporal Shards
TemporalShards.description: Give a unit within your line of sight +3 temporary Bleed Thorns until the end of its turn.

TemporalShards2.name: Temporal Shards
TemporalShards2.description: Give a unit within your line of sight +3 temporary Bleed Thorns until the end of its turn. If its was an ally, the bleed thorns last for the rest of the battle.

RealityScramble.name: Reality Scramble
RealityScramble.description: Randomize the positions of all units. Enemies get Confused.

RealityScramble2.description: Randomize the positions of all units. Enemies get Confused. Non-boss enemies have a 10% chance to be erased from existence.

Glare.name: Glare
Glare.description: Inflict Madness on a unit in your line of sight.

Glare2.description: Inflict Madness and Confusion on a unit in your line of sight.

BlindingFlash.name: Blinding Flash
BlindingFlash.description: Inflict Blind 2 on each unit near you in your line of sight.

BlindingFlash2.description: Inflict Blind 2 on each enemy within five tiles of you in your line of sight.

Snatch.name: Snatch
Snatch.description: Collect any pickup within your line of sight.

Snatch2.description:
Collect any pickup within your line of sight.
Gain +1 [img:lck].

FutureSight.name: Future Sight
FutureSight.description: A unit within your line of sight backflips out of the way the next time they're targeted by an enemy.

FutureSight2.description:
A unit within your line of sight backflips out of the way the next time they're targeted by an enemy.
 [s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

MassManaLeech.name: Mass Mana Leech
MassManaLeech.description: Inflict Mana Leech 2 and Weakness 2 on all units within 3 tiles of you.

MassManaLeech2.description: Inflict Mana Leech 2 and Weakness 2 on all units within 5 tiles of you.

BecomeEntropy.name: Become Entropy
BecomeEntropy.description: Vaporize everything on a tile within your line of sight. Against a boss, this deals damage and inflicts Stun instead.

BecomeEntropy2.description: Vaporize everything on a tile within your line of sight. Against a boss, this deals massive damage and inflicts Stun instead.

FastForward.name: Fast Forward
FastForward.description: Every ally that hasn't taken their turn yet takes their turn right after yours. You go first next round.

FastForward2.description: Every ally that hasn't taken their turn yet takes their turn right after yours. Those units get +4 temporary [img:spd]. You go first next round.

AncestralRecall.name: Ancestral Recall
AncestralRecall.description: Upgrade one of your spells at random for the rest of the battle.

AncestralRecall2.description: Target yourself or a unit within your line of sight and upgrade one of their spells at random for the rest of the battle.

CumulativeBlast.name: Cumulative Blast
CumulativeBlast.description: Deal damage to a unit in your line of sight, then increase this spell's damage by 1 for the rest of the battle.

CumulativeBlast2.description:
Deal damage to a unit in your line of sight, then increase this spell's damage by 1 for the rest of the battle.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Hallucinate.name: Hallucinate
Hallucinate.description: Spawn a friendly illusion of a random unit that fades away after one turn.

Hallucinate2.description: Spawn a friendly illusion of a random unit that fades away after one turn. The illusion gets +4 [img:spd] and +2 Damage.

MassHysteria.name: Mass Hysteria
MassHysteria.description: Every enemy in your line of sight takes an extra turn. They are charmed on that turn.

MassHysteria2.description:
Every enemy in your line of sight takes an extra turn. They are charmed on that turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

ExtraTurnQuestion.name: Extra Turn?
ExtraTurnQuestion.description:
Take an extra turn. You're stunned and don't regenerate mana on that turn.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

ExtraTurnQuestion2.description:
Take an extra turn. You have a 75% chance to be stunned and don't regenerate mana on that turn.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

MindCrack.name: Mindcrack
MindCrack.description: Inflict Magic Weakness 2 on all units in your line of sight.

MindCrack2.description: Inflict Magic Weakness 2 and Confusion 1 on all non-allied units in your line of sight.

Reset.name: Reset
Reset.description:
Revive all bodies, fully heal all units, and clear all status effects.
[s:.7](This spell can be cast only once per battle.)[/s]

Reset2.description:
Revive all bodies, fully heal all units, and clear all status effects.
Castable while you're downed. It costs 0 mana if you're downed.
[s:.7](This spell can be cast only once per battle.)[/s]

Mimic.name: Mimic
Mimic.description: Target an allied cat within your line of sight. Cast one of their spells at random for free (or use their basic attack if theres no good spells).

Mimic2.description:
Target an allied cat within your line of sight. Cast one of their spells at random for free (or use their basic attack if theres no good spells).
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

ChaosSwap.name: Chaos Swap
ChaosSwap.description: Swap positions with a random unit.

ChaosSwap2.description: Swap positions with a random unit. If that unit was an enemy, you inflict Confusion on it.

Asteroid.name: Asteroid
Asteroid.description: Make an asteroid fall onto a tile within your line of sight. The asteroid deals damage and leaves a rock.

Asteroid2.description: Make an asteroid fall onto a tile within your line of sight. The asteroid deals damage, bruises and leaves a boulder.

Stasis.name: Stasis
Stasis.description: Inflict Freeze on a unit within your line of sight.

Stasis2.description: Inflict Freeze 1, Blind 2, and Confusion 2 on a unit within your line of sight.

Pass.name: Pass
Pass.description:
Give a unit within your line of sight an extra turn immediately, then end your turn. 
Castable only if you haven't taken any actions this turn.
[s:.7](This can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

Pass2.description:
Give a unit within your line of sight an extra turn immediately, then end your turn.
Castable only if you haven't taken any actions this turn other than your movement action.
[s:.7](This can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

ThinkDeep.name: Think Deep
ThinkDeep.description:
Restore all of your mana and fall asleep.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

ThinkDeep2.description:
Restore all of your mana and fall asleep.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn. This spell costs 0 mana.)[/s]

Puppet.name: Puppet
Puppet.description: Force an enemy within your line of sight to attack in the direction it's facing.

Puppet2.description: Force a unit within your line of sight to attack in the direction it's facing.

YouSeeNothing.name: Look Away
YouSeeNothing.description: Every unit within your line of sight turns away from you.

YouSeeNothing2.description: Every unit within your line of sight turns away from you and is inflicted with Blind 1.

ForceBlast.name: Gravity Blast
ForceBlast.description: Deal 10 Knockback to adjacent units. If you cast this from full mana, the units take 10 damage on collision.

ForceBlast2.description: Deal 10 Knockback to adjacent units. If you cast this from full mana, the units take 10 damage on collision and get stunned.

IncreaseGravity.name: Increase Gravity
IncreaseGravity.description: Inflict Slow 1 on a unit within your line of sight. If you cast this from full mana, instead inflict Immobilize 1 and deal 6 damage.

IncreaseGravity2.description: Inflict Slow 1 on each unit in an area around a tile within your line of sight. If you cast this from full mana, instead inflict Immobilize 1 and deal 6 damage.

Manifest.name: Manifest
Manifest.description: Teleport in a straight line into a unit within your line of sight. Deal damage and displace it.

Manifest2.description: Teleport into a unit within your line of sight. Deal damage and displace it.

Flip.name: Flip
Flip.description: Turn a unit within your line of sight 180 degrees. Inflict Confusion 1 on that unit.

Flip2.description: Turn a unit within your line of sight 180 degrees. Inflict Confusion 2 and Magic Weakness 1 on that unit.

Withdraw.name: Withdraw
Withdraw.description: Pull any unit within your line of sight to a tile adjacent to you.

Withdraw2.description:
Pull any unit within your line of sight to a tile adjacent to you.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

ForceCone.name: Gravity Wave
ForceCone.description: Deal damage with Knockback 4 and Chain Knockback in a cone.

ForceCone2.description: Deal damage with Knockback 4, Chain Knockback and inflict Bruise 1 in a cone.

Inversion.name: Inversion
Inversion.description: Swap positions with a unit in your line of sight.

Inversion2.description:
Swap positions with a unit in your line of sight.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Echo.name: Echo
Echo.description: Teleport to the last tile you targeted with an ability if it's empty.

Echo2.description: Teleport to the last tile you targeted with an ability. Displace and damage any units on that tile.

Slipstream.name: Slipstream
Slipstream.description: Dash up to three tiles in a straight line or diagonally. Leave floating glass shards on tiles you pass through.

Slipstream2.description: Dash up to five tiles in a straight line or diagonally. Leave floating glass shards on tiles you pass through.
